programs.title: Homestead Rescue
programs.desc: A Californian family longing for ranch life in central Texas find themselves on a homestead that requires a total makeover by the Raneys.

programs.title: The Good Doctor
programs.desc: In an effort to please Salen, Andrews takes on a high-profile case and assigns Shaun and Allen to help perform a risky surgery to restore the voice of a famous pop star.

programs.title: Pretty Little Liars
programs.desc: Emily is on the hunt for answers, and enlists Ezra's help in finding out more about Cyrus and his past connection to Alison.

programs.title: All American
programs.desc: Spencer suffers a devastating setback and gets strength from an unlikely source. Plus, Billy faces some tough truths to get his family back.

programs.title: Flip Or Flop
programs.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home in California, where they find some outdated designs and others that are in-style once again.
